query:
INSERT INTO statutes (jurisdiction, code, section, title, text_content, tags) VALUES
('CA', 'PC', '187', 'Murder Definition',
 'Murder is the unlawful killing of a human being, or a fetus, with malice aforethought.',
 'criminal,homicide,murder'),
('CA', 'PC', '189', 'First and Second Degree Murder',
 'All murder that is perpetrated by means of a destructive device or explosive, a weapon of mass destruction, knowing use of ammunition designed primarily to penetrate metal or armor, poison, lying in wait, torture, or by any other kind of willful, deliberate, and premeditated killing, or that is committed in the perpetration of, or attempt to perpetrate, arson, rape, carjacking, robbery, burglary, mayhem, kidnapping, train wrecking, or any act punishable under Section 206, 286, 287, 288, or 289, or former Section 288a, or murder that is perpetrated by means of discharging a firearm from a motor vehicle, intentionally at another person outside of the vehicle with the intent to inflict death, is murder of the first degree. All other kinds of murders are of the second degree.',
 'criminal,homicide,murder_degrees'),
('CA', 'PC', '192', 'Manslaughter Definition',
 'Manslaughter is the unlawful killing of a human being without malice. It is of three kinds: (a) Voluntary—upon a sudden quarrel or heat of passion. (b) Involuntary—in the commission of an unlawful act, not amounting to a felony; or in the commission of a lawful act which might produce death, in an unlawful manner, or without due caution and circumspection. (c) Vehicular.',
 'criminal,homicide,manslaughter'),
('CA', 'PC', '240', 'Assault Definition',
 'An assault is an unlawful attempt, coupled with a present ability, to commit a violent injury on the person of another.',
 'criminal,assault,violence'),
('CA', 'PC', '242', 'Battery Definition',
 'A battery is any willful and unlawful use of force or violence upon the person of another.',
 'criminal,battery,violence'),
('CA', 'PC', '459', 'Burglary Definition',
 'Every person who enters any house, room, apartment, tenement, shop, warehouse, store, mill, barn, stable, outhouse or other building, tent, vessel, floating home, railroad car, locked or sealed cargo container, whether or not mounted on a vehicle, trailer coach, any house car, inhabited camper, vehicle when the doors are locked, aircraft, or mine or any underground portion thereof, with intent to commit grand or petit larceny or any felony is guilty of burglary.',
 'criminal,burglary,theft'),
('CA', 'PC', '211', 'Robbery Definition',
 'Robbery is the felonious taking of personal property in the possession of another, from his person or immediate presence, and against his will, accomplished by means of force or fear.',
 'criminal,robbery,theft'),
('CA', 'PC', '487', 'Grand Theft Definition',
 'Grand theft is theft committed when the money, labor, or real or personal property taken is of a value exceeding nine hundred fifty dollars ($950); when the property is taken from the person of another; when the property taken is an automobile, firearm, horse, mare, gelding, any bovine animal, any caprine animal, mule, jack, jenny, sheep, lamb, hog, sow, boar, gilt, barrow, or pig.',
 'criminal,theft,grand_theft'),
('CA', 'PC', '484', 'Theft Definition',
 'Every person who shall feloniously steal, take, carry, lead, or drive away the personal property of another, or who shall fraudulently appropriate property which has been entrusted to him or her, or who shall knowingly and designedly, by any false or fraudulent representation or pretense, defraud any other person of money, labor or real or personal property, is guilty of theft.',
 'criminal,theft,larceny'),
('CA', 'PC', '261', 'Rape Definition',
 'Rape is an act of sexual intercourse accomplished with a person not the spouse of the perpetrator, under any of the following circumstances: (1) Where a person is incapable, because of a mental disorder or developmental or physical disability, of giving legal consent. (2) Where it is accomplished against a person''s will by means of force, violence, duress, menace, or fear of immediate and unlawful bodily injury.',
 'criminal,sexual_assault,rape'),
('CA', 'PC', '1170', 'Determinate Sentencing',
 'Except as otherwise provided by law, and subject to Section 1170.1, a felony shall be punishable by imprisonment in the state prison for 16 months, or two or three years, unless the offense is punishable pursuant to subdivision (h) of this section.',
 'criminal,sentencing,felony'),
('CA', 'PC', '17', 'Felony vs Misdemeanor Classification',
 'A felony is a crime that is punishable with death, by imprisonment in the state prison, or notwithstanding any other provision of law, by imprisonment in a county jail under the provisions of subdivision (h) of Section 1170. Every other crime or public offense is a misdemeanor except those offenses that are classified as infractions.',
 'criminal,classification,felony_misdemeanor'),
('CA', 'PC', '1192.7', 'Serious Felony Definition',
 'As used in this chapter, "serious felony" means any of the following: murder or voluntary manslaughter; mayhem; rape; sodomy by force, violence, duress, menace, or threat of great bodily harm; oral copulation by force, violence, duress, menace, or threat of great bodily harm; a lewd act on a child under the age of 14 years; any felony punishable by death or imprisonment in the state prison for life; any other felony in which the defendant personally inflicts great bodily injury on any person.',
 'criminal,serious_felony,three_strikes'),
('CA', 'PC', '667', 'Three Strikes Law',
 'If a defendant has been convicted of a felony and it has been pled and proved that the defendant has one or more prior serious and/or violent felony convictions, the court shall adhere to each of the following: The determinate term or minimum term for an indeterminate term shall be twice the term otherwise provided as punishment for the current felony conviction.',
 'criminal,three_strikes,sentencing');
command:

('CA', 'PC', '261', 'Rape Definition',

('CA', 'PC', '1192.7', 'Serious Felony Definition',
 'As used in this chapter, "serious felony" means any of the following: murder or voluntary manslaughter; mayhem; rape; sodomy by force, violence, duress, menace, or threat of great bodily harm; oral copulation by force, violence, duress, menace, or threat of great bodily harm; a lewd act on a child under the age of 14 years; any felony punishable by death or imprisonment in the state prison for life; any other felony in which the defendant personally inflicts great bodily injury on any person.',
